title: Who may organize
doc_html:
§123.  Who may organize

Ten or more persons, a majority of whom are residents of this state, engaged in the production of agricultural products may form a non-profit, co-operative association, with or without capital stock, under the provisions of this Part.
doc_text:
§123.  Who may organize
Ten or more persons, a majority of whom are residents of this state, engaged in the production of agricultural products may form a non-profit, co-operative association, with or without capital stock, under the provisions of this Part.
